sources.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
sources.activation_reason: Highest-quality structured engineering skill collection (24 skills, 75k stars, MIT). Full dev lifecycle: spec→plan→build→test→review→ship. Unique anti-rationalization and verification-gate patterns. 50 contributors, very active (last push 2026-07-08). Meets all autonomous activation criteria.
activation_evidence: skills/ directory with 24 SKILL.md files in structured skill-name/SKILL.md format with consistent frontmatter anatomy
MIT license confirmed via LICENSE file
Public GitHub repo, no credentials or private access needed
75.3k stars, 435 watchers, 50 contributors, 5 releases
Last push 2026-07-08 — actively maintained
Multi-agent compatibility documented: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Windsurf, OpenCode, Copilot, Antigravity, Kiro

sources.name: ghaida/intent

license.evidence: LICENSE in repo (Creative Commons Zero — maximally permissive)

sources.activation_reason: Unique UX design domain with zero catalog coverage. 16 skills + 6 specialist agents covering product design practice: strategy, research, experience design, QA, engineering handoff. CC0-1.0 license (maximally permissive). 71 stars, 8 releases. Fills a major non-engineering gap in the catalog.
activation_evidence: 16 SKILL.md files in structured .claude/skills/ layout
6 agent personas (Noor, Ember, Wren, Vigil, Rune, Sage) with skill composition
CC0-1.0 license confirmed — maximally permissive public domain dedication
72+ anti-patterns cataloged in intent/references/
8 deep reference documents: research methods, IA, interaction patterns, content strategy, accessibility, service design, measurement, ethical design
Public GitHub repo, no credentials needed
Last push 2026-05-31 — actively maintained

sources.name: 0x-Professor/Agent-Skills-Hub
sources.activation_reason: Only source covering cybersecurity/pentesting domain (zero catalog coverage). 44 skills with standardized contract including authorization gates. Apache-2.0 license. Preview status because last activity was 4+ months ago (2026-02-26), so semantic freshness needs confirmation by downstream analysis.
activation_evidence: 44 SKILL.md files in structured skills/ layout with standardized contract (SKILL.md + agents/openai.yaml)
Pentest skills include security gates: --scope, --target, --i-have-authorization flags
Apache-2.0 license confirmed via LICENSE file
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: smoke tests, scenario tests, security regression checks
Public GitHub repo, no credentials needed
Last push 2026-02-26 — acceptable for preview but not active

sources.name: agent-skills-hub/agent-skills-hub
sources.activation_reason: Broad multi-domain registry (790+ skills) with substantial non-engineering coverage: scientific (120+), marketing, plus standard engineering domains. Clear attribution to upstream sources. MIT license. Preview because many skills are derivations from upstream; extraction/normalization must determine unique vs. derivative value.
activation_evidence: 790+ SKILL.md files in structured skills/ directory
Clear ATTRIBUTION.md listing upstream sources: antigravity-awesome-skills, claude-scientific-skills, marketingskills
MIT license confirmed via LICENSE file
NPX-first CLI for multi-agent installation (8+ agent targets)
Non-engineering domains: scientific skills (120+), marketing skills
Public GitHub repo, no credentials needed
Last push 2026-05-20 — actively maintained
